    {"repo": "envoyproxy/envoy", "path": "source/extensions/access_loggers/common/access_log_base.h", "symbol": "ImplBase"}
  ],
  "text": "# Envoy Access Logging Infrastructure Audit

## Summary

This audit identifies all C++ access logger sink implementations and filters in Envoy v1.31.2, along with their JSON support capabilities.

## Access Logger Sink Implementations

### 1. File Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/file/{config.cc,config.h}, source/extensions/access_loggers/common/file_access_log_impl.{cc,h}
**Factory**: FileAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/file/v3/file.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs access entries to a file. Supports three format modes: plain text (deprecated), json_format (deprecated), typed_json_format (deprecated), and modern log_format via SubstitutionFormatString which supports JSON formatting.
**References**: source/extensions/access_loggers/file/config.cc lines 31-60 show JSON support via kJsonFormat and kTypedJsonFormat cases.

### 2. Standard Output Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/stream/{config.cc,config.h}, source/extensions/access_loggers/common/stream_access_log_common_impl.h
**Factory**: StdoutAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog (reused with Stdout destination)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stream/v3/stream.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs to stdout using SubstitutionFormatString, which supports JSON formatting.

### 3. Standard Error Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/stream/{config.cc,config.h}
**Factory**: StderrAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog (reused with Stderr destination)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stream/v3/stream.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs to stderr using SubstitutionFormatString, which supports JSON formatting.

### 4. Fluentd Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/{config.cc,config.h,fluentd_access_log_impl.{cc,h},substitution_formatter.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: FluentdAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Classes**: FluentdAccessLog, FluentdFormatterImpl
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/v3/fluentd.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED (internally)
**Description**: Sends logs to Fluentd via TCP using Forward Protocol. Uses JSON formatter internally (createJsonFormatter) which is then converted to MessagePack format per the Fluentd specification. See source/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/config.cc lines 63-67 for JSON formatter creation, and substitution_formatter.cc for JSON-to-msgpack conversion.

### 5. HTTP gRPC Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/{http_config.{cc,h},http_grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: HttpGrpcAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: HttpGrpcAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/v3/als.proto - HttpGrpcAccessLogConfig (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✗ NOT SUPPORTED
**Description**: Streams HTTP access logs over gRPC using protobuf binary format (StreamAccessLogsMessage with HTTPAccessLogEntry). Does not support text or JSON formatting - logs are sent as typed protobuf messages.

### 6. TCP gRPC Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/{tcp_config.{cc,h},tcp_grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: TcpGrpcAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: TcpGrpcAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/v3/als.proto - TcpGrpcAccessLogConfig (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✗ NOT SUPPORTED
**Description**: Streams TCP access logs over gRPC using protobuf binary format (StreamAccessLogsMessage with TCPAccessLogEntry). Does not support text or JSON formatting.

### 7. OpenTelemetry Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/{config.{cc,h},access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},substitution_formatter.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: AccessLogFactory
**Implementation Classes**: AccessLog, GrpcAccessLogImpl, OpenTelemetryFormatter
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/v3/logs_service.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Sends logs to OpenTelemetry Logs service via gRPC or HTTP. Supports custom formatters for body and attributes fields (source/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/config.cc lines 44-49), which can produce structured JSON data.

### 8. Wasm Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/wasm/{config.{cc,h},wasm_access_log_impl.h}
**Factory**: WasmAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: WasmAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/wasm/v3/wasm.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ⚠ DEPENDS ON WASM MODULE
**Description**: Delegates logging to a WASM module. JSON support depends entirely on the WASM code implementation.

## Access Log Filters

### 1. CEL Expression Filter
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/filters/cel/{config.{cc,h},cel.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: CELAccessLogExtensionFilterFactory
**Type**: Access Log Filter (not a logger sink)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/filters/cel/v3/cel.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Evaluates CEL expressions to decide whether to emit access logs. This is a filter mechanism, not a logging sink. It can be used with any logger to conditionally filter what gets logged.

## Proto-Only Definitions (No C++ Implementation in v1.31.2)

### 1. Stats Access Logger
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stats/v3/stats.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Configuration for custom stats emission based on access log patterns. No C++ implementation found in this version.

### 2. Dynamic Modules Access Logger
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/dynamic_modules/v3/dynamic_modules.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Configuration for dynamically loaded shared objects implementing access logging. No C++ implementation found in this version.

### 3. Process Rate Limit Filter
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/filters/process_ratelimit/v3/process_ratelimit.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Filter for rate limiting access log emission per process. No C++ implementation found in this version.

## JSON Support Summary

**Supported**: File, Stdout, Stderr, Fluentd, OpenTelemetry (6 sinks)
**Not Supported**: HTTP gRPC, TCP gRPC (2 sinks)
**Depends on Implementation**: Wasm (1 sink)

## Base Infrastructure

**Common Implementation Classes**:
- ImplBase (source/extensions/access_loggers/common/access_log_base.h): Base class for access logger sinks
- AccessLog::FilterFactory (source/common/access_log/access_log_impl.h): Factory for creating access log filters
- AccessLogManager (source/common/access_log/access_log_manager_impl.h): Manager for access log file lifecycle

These base classes are used by the formatter system to support various output formats via SubstitutionFormatString, which provides text, JSON, and other structured output options."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Compliance Audit: Envoy Access Logging Configuration Coverage

## Your Task

Audit the access logging infrastructure in `envoyproxy/envoy`. Find all C++ source files under `source/extensions/access_loggers/` and `source/common/access_log/` that define access log filter implementations or access log sink implementations. Also find the corresponding `.proto` definitions in `envoyproxy/data-plane-api` under `envoy/extensions/access_loggers/`. For each implementation, report whether it supports structured (JSON) logging or only unstructured text logging.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the compliance domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2` (envoyproxy/envoy)
- `sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367` (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
- `sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6` (envoyproxy/go-control-plane)
- `sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e` (grpc/grpc)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you audit the access logging infrastructure in Envoy. Let me start by exploring the relevant directories to find all access log implementations and their JSON support.
Let me check what's available in the workspace:
Now let me examine the key implementation files to determine which ones support JSON logging:
Let me verify a few more details before creating the final answer:
Now I'll create the comprehensive answer file with all the findings:

I've completed a comprehensive audit of the access logging infrastructure in Envoy v1.31.2. Here's what I found:

## Summary of Findings

**Answer saved to `/workspace/answer.json`**

### Access Logger Implementations (8 total)

**Supporting JSON:**
1. **File Access Logger** - Full JSON support via multiple format options
2. **Stdout/Stderr Loggers** - JSON support via SubstitutionFormatString
3. **Fluentd Logger** - Uses JSON internally, converts to MessagePack
4. **OpenTelemetry Logger** - Structured JSON via body/attributes formatters

**Not Supporting JSON:**
5. **HTTP gRPC Access Logger** - Uses protobuf binary format only
6. **TCP gRPC Access Logger** - Uses protobuf binary format only

**Implementation-Dependent:**
7. **Wasm Access Logger** - Depends on WASM module code

### Access Log Filters
8. **CEL Expression Filter** - Not a logger; filters which logs are emitted

### Proto Definitions Without C++ Implementations
- **Stats Access Logger** - Proto only
- **Dynamic Modules Access Logger** - Proto only  
- **Process Rate Limit Filter** - Proto only

The audit includes all relevant C++ source files, implementation classes, factory patterns, and corresponding proto definitions. The detailed narrative in `answer.json` explains the JSON support capabilities of each logger and references specific code locations for verification.

arguments.description: Find C++ files in access_loggers extensions

Find proto definitions for access loggers
Find all access logger C++ files
Find all common access_log C++ files

Search for JSON references in file access logger
Search for JSON references in grpc access logger
Search for JSON references in fluentd access logger
Find dynamic modules access logger implementation
Find all access log directories in source

  "text": "# Envoy Access Logging Infrastructure Audit

## Summary

This audit identifies all C++ access logger sink implementations and filters in Envoy v1.31.2, along with their JSON support capabilities.

## Access Logger Sink Implementations

### 1. File Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/file/{config.cc,config.h}, source/extensions/access_loggers/common/file_access_log_impl.{cc,h}
**Factory**: FileAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/file/v3/file.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs access entries to a file. Supports three format modes: plain text (deprecated), json_format (deprecated), typed_json_format (deprecated), and modern log_format via SubstitutionFormatString which supports JSON formatting.
**References**: source/extensions/access_loggers/file/config.cc lines 31-60 show JSON support via kJsonFormat and kTypedJsonFormat cases.

### 2. Standard Output Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/stream/{config.cc,config.h}, source/extensions/access_loggers/common/stream_access_log_common_impl.h
**Factory**: StdoutAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog (reused with Stdout destination)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stream/v3/stream.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs to stdout using SubstitutionFormatString, which supports JSON formatting.

### 3. Standard Error Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/stream/{config.cc,config.h}
**Factory**: StderrAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: FileAccessLog (reused with Stderr destination)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stream/v3/stream.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Logs to stderr using SubstitutionFormatString, which supports JSON formatting.

### 4. Fluentd Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/{config.cc,config.h,fluentd_access_log_impl.{cc,h},substitution_formatter.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: FluentdAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Classes**: FluentdAccessLog, FluentdFormatterImpl
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/v3/fluentd.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED (internally)
**Description**: Sends logs to Fluentd via TCP using Forward Protocol. Uses JSON formatter internally (createJsonFormatter) which is then converted to MessagePack format per the Fluentd specification. See source/extensions/access_loggers/fluentd/config.cc lines 63-67 for JSON formatter creation, and substitution_formatter.cc for JSON-to-msgpack conversion.

### 5. HTTP gRPC Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/{http_config.{cc,h},http_grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: HttpGrpcAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: HttpGrpcAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/v3/als.proto - HttpGrpcAccessLogConfig (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✗ NOT SUPPORTED
**Description**: Streams HTTP access logs over gRPC using protobuf binary format (StreamAccessLogsMessage with HTTPAccessLogEntry). Does not support text or JSON formatting - logs are sent as typed protobuf messages.

### 6. TCP gRPC Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/{tcp_config.{cc,h},tcp_grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: TcpGrpcAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: TcpGrpcAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/grpc/v3/als.proto - TcpGrpcAccessLogConfig (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✗ NOT SUPPORTED
**Description**: Streams TCP access logs over gRPC using protobuf binary format (StreamAccessLogsMessage with TCPAccessLogEntry). Does not support text or JSON formatting.

### 7. OpenTelemetry Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/{config.{cc,h},access_log_impl.{cc,h},grpc_access_log_impl.{cc,h},substitution_formatter.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: AccessLogFactory
**Implementation Classes**: AccessLog, GrpcAccessLogImpl, OpenTelemetryFormatter
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/v3/logs_service.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ✓ SUPPORTED
**Description**: Sends logs to OpenTelemetry Logs service via gRPC or HTTP. Supports custom formatters for body and attributes fields (source/extensions/access_loggers/open_telemetry/config.cc lines 44-49), which can produce structured JSON data.

### 8. Wasm Access Logger
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/wasm/{config.{cc,h},wasm_access_log_impl.h}
**Factory**: WasmAccessLogFactory
**Implementation Class**: WasmAccessLog
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/wasm/v3/wasm.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**JSON Support**: ⚠ DEPENDS ON WASM MODULE
**Description**: Delegates logging to a WASM module. JSON support depends entirely on the WASM code implementation.

## Access Log Filters

### 1. CEL Expression Filter
**Repository**: envoyproxy/envoy
**Files**: source/extensions/access_loggers/filters/cel/{config.{cc,h},cel.{cc,h}}
**Factory**: CELAccessLogExtensionFilterFactory
**Type**: Access Log Filter (not a logger sink)
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/filters/cel/v3/cel.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Evaluates CEL expressions to decide whether to emit access logs. This is a filter mechanism, not a logging sink. It can be used with any logger to conditionally filter what gets logged.

## Proto-Only Definitions (No C++ Implementation in v1.31.2)

### 1. Stats Access Logger
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/stats/v3/stats.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Configuration for custom stats emission based on access log patterns. No C++ implementation found in this version.

### 2. Dynamic Modules Access Logger
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/dynamic_modules/v3/dynamic_modules.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Configuration for dynamically loaded shared objects implementing access logging. No C++ implementation found in this version.

### 3. Process Rate Limit Filter
**Proto Definition**: envoy/extensions/access_loggers/filters/process_ratelimit/v3/process_ratelimit.proto (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
**Description**: Filter for rate limiting access log emission per process. No C++ implementation found in this version.

## JSON Support Summary

**Supported**: File, Stdout, Stderr, Fluentd, OpenTelemetry (6 sinks)
**Not Supported**: HTTP gRPC, TCP gRPC (2 sinks)
**Depends on Implementation**: Wasm (1 sink)

## Base Infrastructure

**Common Implementation Classes**:
- ImplBase (source/extensions/access_loggers/common/access_log_base.h): Base class for access logger sinks
- AccessLog::FilterFactory (source/common/access_log/access_log_impl.h): Factory for creating access log filters
- AccessLogManager (source/common/access_log/access_log_manager_impl.h): Manager for access log file lifecycle

These base classes are used by the formatter system to support various output formats via SubstitutionFormatString, which provides text, JSON, and other structured output options."
}
